title: The Solar Plexus Center — Emotions & Spirit
description: This center governs emotions & feelings. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
topic: The Solar Plexus Center — Emotions & Spirit
learningGoal: The viewer understands what the SolarPlexus center governs, and what it means for them when it is defined versus open — and feels recognised, not labelled.
keyPoints: When defined: You ride an emotional wave — your moods have a reliable rhythm. You're emotionally powerful and feel everything deeply.
When open: You amplify and absorb others' emotions. That intense feeling may not be yours. Ask: "Is this my emotion or someone else's?"
forbiddenClaims: a defined center is better, stronger, or more evolved than an open center
open centers are flaws or weaknesses to fix
you can or should change which of your centers are defined

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: The Solar Plexus Center — Emotions & Spirit — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: The Solar Plexus Center — Emotions & Spirit — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: The Solar Plexus Center — Emotions & Spirit — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: The Solar Plexus Center — Emotions & Spirit — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: The Solar Plexus Center — Emotions & Spirit — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: This center governs emotions & feelings. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
